tagline: Starlink setups for RV, marine & expedition vehicles
hero_headline: Tired of tweaking your RV Starlink endlessly? Get tested configs that work first time.
hero_sub: Real-world tested routers, mounts, and power setups with wiring guides. No wrong purchases. No guessing.
pains: Buying wrong Starlink hardware is expensive: incompatible parts, frustrating installs, and lengthy returns waste time and money
Starlink doesn't document third-party gear. DIY bypass configs mean unstable speeds, power drain, and lost uptime
No standard specs for hardware choices. Every decision is a guess. Constant swapping = constant costs

features.title: Compatibility Checker
features.desc: Enter your router model and see what works instantly. Get full wiring diagrams and step-by-step setup.

features.title: Field-Tested Configs
features.desc: Real rigs from RV, sailing, and expedition communities. Complete wiring maps and tuning guides included.

features.title: Performance Data
features.desc: Real-world speed, power consumption, and uptime for every combo. Know exactly what you're buying.

features.title: Gear Recommendations
features.desc: Curated bundles by use case. Compatibility guaranteed. Multi-vendor buying links in one place.

how.desc: RV, sailboat, or expedition? Choose your router and use case.
See compatible hardware, wiring, real speeds, and power draw instantly.
Follow step-by-step wiring, configure bypass mode, verify performance. Expert support on call.

proof: Early beta users directly shape our roadmap—your field data drives what we build next
cta_sub: Beta users get free library access and priority expert support

faq.q: Will my router model be in the database?
faq.a: We cover Starlink Gen2/Gen3 and major third-party hardware. Community adds new configs constantly. Can't find yours? Submit feedback or help us test it.

faq.q: Where does the data come from? Can I trust it?
faq.a: All real-world tests from RV, sailing, and expedition communities. Every config traces back to the tester, hardware, conditions, and date. Transparent. Verifiable.

faq.q: What if my install goes wrong?
faq.a: We connect you with pro installers for hands-on support. If a config has issues, we coordinate fixes and updates based on real user feedback.
